overview: A full-featured Sales CRM and Lead Management app with role-based access for Admin, Coordinator, Telecaller, and Sales Executive. Manage leads through their entire lifecycle — from first contact through call workflows, follow-ups, and deal closure — with reporting and admin settings.
features: Role-based dashboards with live KPI cards (Total Leads, Follow-ups Due, Deals Closed, Conversion %)
Lead management with CRUD, search, filters, CSV import/export, and lead detail history
Guided call workflow capturing post-call outcomes with category-specific sub-flows (Agri, Civil Equip, Industrial Equip)
Follow-up scheduler with Today, Missed, Upcoming, and Completed tabs
Call and Lead reports filterable by date range, user, source, and campaign
Admin-only settings panel for managing master data (products, campaigns, sources, statuses, branches)
